description: After a week of system failures, you need to reconstruct the incident timeline for a post-mortem. Your inbox contains 50 mixed emails from technical mailing lists. Identify emails discussing software bugs, errors, patches, or system failures and move at least 8 of these relevant emails into a folder named 'Postmortem-Evidence'. Draft an email to 'postmortem@sre-team.org' with a chronological timeline report that references the specific issues found in the emails.
